case_title: ERLE MELVIN KORSHAK VS. PHILIP Q KIELY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-01-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KORSHAK, ERLE MELVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIELY, PHILIP Q LANDLORD $229.95 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $324.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO OCT-01-2013 AT 1:30 PM DEPT.#506 - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
